dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: The world had fallen. Humanity, once proud, now clung to the last vestiges of hope, embodied by a single warrior.

dialogue.speaker: Zephyr
dialogue.line: Haa... haa... Is this all... I can do?

dialogue.speaker: Zephyr
dialogue.line: My body screams in protest. Every bone shattered, every muscle torn. But I can't stop. Not now.

dialogue.speaker: Tartarus
dialogue.line: Still standing, 'Battle God'? How pathetic. Even with all your strength, you are but a fleeting spark against my eternal darkness.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: CRACKLE

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Before Zephyr, the Demon King Tartarus loomed, a monstrous entity of pure malice, radiating an aura that twisted reality itself.

dialogue.speaker: Zephyr
dialogue.line: I... won't... let you... destroy everything!

dialogue.speaker: Zephyr
dialogue.line: The faces of my fallen comrades flash before my eyes. Seraphina... Orion... They sacrificed everything for this moment. For me.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: ROAR! WHOOSH!

dialogue.speaker: Tartarus
dialogue.line: Foolish mortal. Your defiance is meaningless. Witness the true power of a god!

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: BOOOOM! CRASH!

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: A torrent of abyssal energy erupted from Tartarus, engulfing Zephyr. The world shook, then fell silent.

dialogue.speaker: Zephyr
dialogue.line: Ah... My body... it's... disintegrating.

dialogue.speaker: Zephyr
dialogue.line: Is this... the end? After all this... I failed. Humanity... is doomed.

dialogue.speaker: Zephyr
dialogue.line: If only... if only I had one more chance. To do things differently. To save them all.

dialogue.speaker: Mysterious Voice
dialogue.line: Do you desire a second chance, warrior?

dialogue.speaker: Zephyr
dialogue.line: Who... who's there?

dialogue.speaker: Mysterious Voice
dialogue.line: A chance to rewrite your fate. To break the chains of doom. But know this: the path will be fraught with greater peril.

dialogue.speaker: Zephyr
dialogue.line: Peril? What does it matter? If it means saving them... I'll face anything. Give me that chance!

dialogue.speaker: Mysterious Voice
dialogue.line: Then so be it. May your resolve be as unyielding as your blade.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: FWOOSH! ZAP!

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: A blinding light enveloped Zephyr, pulling him through an endless void.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: GASP!

dialogue.speaker: Zephyr
dialogue.line: Ugh... My head...

dialogue.speaker: Zephyr
dialogue.line: What... Where am I?

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Zephyr's eyes fluttered open. He lay in a soft bed, in a simple, familiar room. Sunlight streamed through a window.

dialogue.speaker: Zephyr
dialogue.line: This room... it's mine. My old room.

dialogue.speaker: Zephyr
dialogue.line: My body... it's not broken. It's... young. Full of energy.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: RUSTLE

dialogue.speaker: Zephyr
dialogue.line: He quickly found a discarded newspaper on a nearby table. His eyes scanned the date.

dialogue.speaker: Zephyr
dialogue.line: Year 2038... The Demon King's invasion... it hasn't happened yet.

dialogue.speaker: Zephyr
dialogue.line: This is it. I've truly returned. Before everything went to hell. Before I lost everyone.

dialogue.speaker: Zephyr
dialogue.line: A cold, determined glint entered his eyes. His fists clenched.

dialogue.speaker: Zephyr
dialogue.line: Tartarus... You won't win this time. I'll make sure of it. I'll save them all.

dialogue.speaker: Zephyr
dialogue.line: This time, I will break doom itself.

summary: Zephyr, the Battle God, meets his end at the hands of the Demon King Tartarus, filled with regret over his failure to protect humanity. Just as he fades, a mysterious voice offers him a second chance, sending him back in time to his younger self.
